title: Critical Core Skills (CCS)
text:
Critical Core Skills (CCS) - SupportGoWhere
Critical Core Skills (CCS)
Share link
Provides information on the essential skills across 3 skills clusters for employability and career development.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Includes 16 competencies across 3 skill clusters
Supports employability by aiding in the acquisition of technical skills and competencies
SkillsFuture Singapore (SSG) has appointed 13 Approved Training Organisations (ATOs) to deliver CCS-aligned modular training programmes
Collapse all sections
About this support

Enhances employability and career development through 16 competencies across 3 skill clusters: Thinking Critically, Interacting with Others, and Staying Relevant

Supports career mobility by providing strategies, direction, and motivation for ongoing technical skill development

Who is this for?

Individuals seeking to equip themselves with transferable soft skills for employability and career development

Employers aiming to enhance their workforce's adaptability and technical skills for business transformation

Training providers developing soft skills curriculum integrated with technical skills training

How to apply?

To engage with the Critical Core Skills (CCS) initiative:

Download CCS reference documents for skill descriptions and proficiency levels, as well as to determine if you have the required skills, from the SkillsFuture website

Review the CCS Proficiency Level Ruler to understand the required levels of responsibility, autonomy, and complexity

Access the list of Approved Training Organisations (ATOs) for CCS Programmes to find suitable training opportunities

Where can I find help?

View more details
